events.description: motion-nominated (net sweep +0.140 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from its current lane into the adjacent lane on its left.
The ego-vehicle moves from the left lane into the center lane.
The ego-vehicle moves from the center lane to the rightmost lane. / The ego-vehicle moves from the middle lane to the rightmost lane on the highway.
motion-nominated (net sweep +0.102 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from the middle lane into the adjacent lane to its left. / The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the left.

The ego-vehicle drifts right and crosses the dashed line to enter the adjacent lane. / motion-nominated (net sweep -0.108 of width) / The ego-vehicle drifts right across a dashed white line and settles into the adjacent lane.

The ego-vehicle changes lanes to the left to enter the HOV lane. / The ego-vehicle performs another lane change to the left to enter the far-left lane. / The ego-vehicle moves from the middle lane into the leftmost lane. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.111 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves into the lane to its left. / The ego-vehicle moves left from its current lane into the adjacent lane to the left.
The ego-vehicle shifts from its current lane to the one on its left. / The ego-vehicle shifts from its current lane into the adjacent lane on the left.

motion-nominated (net sweep -0.141 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from the leftmost lane into the lane on its right. / The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the right. / The ego-vehicle moves from its current lane into the adjacent lane to the right.

The ego-vehicle performs a second lane change to the left, moving into the leftmost lane. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.162 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves from its current lane into the lane to its left. / The ego-vehicle moves left from its current lane into the HOV lane.
The ego-vehicle shifts one more lane to the right.

The ego-vehicle moves from its current lane to the adjacent lane on the right. / The ego-vehicle performs a continuous double lane change to the right, crossing two lane markings to settle in the third lane from the left. / motion-nominated (net sweep -0.117 of width)
